name: Atrium Indexer Health
description: Scribe block lag, Lantern publish cadence, Vigil-keeper tick latency

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT latest(custom.scribe.blockLag) FROM Metric TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE name = 'lantern-publish' TIMESERIES 10 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT average(duration) FROM Transaction WHERE name = 'vigil-keeper-tick' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 6 hours ago
